prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（原理科）最低位次依次约11927→12779→13026→21043→19519名。2021–2023年位次在1.2万–1.3万区间窄幅波动，2024年因新高考改革（物理类/历史类分科）出现较大波动至21043名，2025年回升至19519名，近两年基准位次约1.9万–2.1万名；2021–2023年理科计划104–110人，2024年物理类116人，2025年133人，2026年计划161人，较2025年扩招28人（+21%），扩招幅度显著，将导致竞争加剧、位次数字后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 郑州大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名从2021年第53位持续上升至2026年第44位，近年排名稳步提升，反映学校综合实力增强，对考生吸引力有所提升；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及学校管理回应类舆情事件，未见投档线异常或断档信号；抖音热度排名第8（高热），短视频平台曝光量大，报考关注度较高；第五轮学科评估中郑州大学无A-及以上等级学科，学科精度相对一般，但作为综合性大学学科覆盖面广，对中等分数段考生仍有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐，临床医学、口腔医学保持偏热，与郑州大学招生专业高度匹配；江西省2026年高考总人数约47.49万，物理类估算约26.78万人，较2025年略有增加，竞争基数微升。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次19519名、2026年大幅扩招21%导致竞争加剧（位次后移）、软科排名持续上升增强吸引力（位次前移）、抖音高热反映关注度提升等多重因素，经小幅修正后预测2026年物理类最低录取位次约21934名，区间21434–22434名。扩招是位次后移的最主要驱动因素，学校排名上升和抖音高热部分抵消了扩招的负面影响。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (formerly Science) were approximately 11927 → 12779 → 13026 → 21043 → 19519. Rankings fluctuated narrowly between 12,000 and 13,000 from 2021 to 2023, but in 2024, due to the new college entrance examination reform (Physics/History category split), there was a significant fluctuation to 21043, rebounding to 19519 in 2025. The baseline ranking for the past two years is approximately 19,000–21,000; from 2021 to 2023, the science enrollment plan was 104–110, in 2024 it was 116 for Physics Category, in 2025 it was 133, and in 2026 the plan is 161, an increase of 28 students (+21%) compared to 2025. This significant expansion will intensify competition and push rankings downward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhengzhou University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science China University Ranking has steadily risen from 53rd in 2021 to 44th in 2026, reflecting an enhancement in overall strength and increased attractiveness to candidates; in 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving public opinion incidents related to school management responses, with no signs of abnormal admission cutoffs or gaps; Douyin popularity ranks 8th (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms and relatively high application attention; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Zhengzhou University has no disciplines rated A- or above, so disciplinary precision is relatively average, but as a comprehensive university with a wide range of disciplines, it still has strong appeal to mid-score candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, while Clinical Medicine and Stomatology remain relatively popular, closely matching Zhengzhou University's enrollment majors; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Jiangxi college entrance examination is approximately 474,900, with an estimated 267,800 in the Physics Category, a slight increase from 2025, leading to a minor rise in the competition base.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 19519, the significant 21% expansion in 2026 leading to intensified competition (ranking shift downward), the continuous rise in Soft Science rankings enhancing attractiveness (ranking shift upward), and the high Douyin heat reflecting increased attention, after minor adjustments, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 21934, with a range of 21434–22434. Expansion is the main driver of the ranking shift downward, while the rise in university rankings and high Douyin heat partially offset the negative impact of expansion.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 21434–22434, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 21000), you can focus on aiming for popular engineering majors in Tier 1 such as Electronic Information and Computer Science and Technology; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., outside 22000), you should focus on Tier 2 majors like Mathematics, Physics, and Mechanical, and use Tier 3 majors such as Chemical and Pharmaceutical and Water Resources as safe backups.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (formerly Liberal Arts) were approximately 1998 → 2187 → 2173 → 3078 → 2901. Rankings fluctuated narrowly between 2000–2200 from 2021 to 2023, experienced a significant fluctuation to 3078 in 2024 due to the new college entrance examination reform, and slightly recovered to 2901 in 2025, with a baseline ranking of about 2900–3100 in recent two years; liberal arts enrollment was 37 in 2021–2022, 31 in 2023, 33 in 2024 for History Category, 35 in 2025, and planned 37 in 2026, an increase of 2 students (+5.7%) compared to 2025, a relatively small expansion with limited impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhengzhou University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has steadily risen from 53rd in 2021 to 44th in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to candidates; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving university management response-related public opinion incidents, with no signs of abnormal admission cutoffs or gaps; Douyin popularity ranks 8th (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms and considerable attention for applications; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Zhengzhou University has no disciplines rated A- or above, with relatively average disciplinary precision, but as a comprehensive university, it offers a wide range of liberal arts programs, still attractive to mid-score liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major popularity is divided and wait-and-see, Chinese Language/Literature is relatively hot and recommended, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged, matching Zhengzhou University's History Category enrollment majors (Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism and Communication, etc.); the estimated number of History Category candidates in Jiangxi Province in 2026 is about 207,000, roughly the same as in 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2901, a slight expansion of 5.7% in 2026 leading to slightly intensified competition (ranking shift backward), the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking enhancing attractiveness (ranking shift forward), and high Douyin heat reflecting increased attention, after minor adjustments, the predicted minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 3030, with a range of 2530–3530. The expansion and slight increase in candidate numbers are the main drivers for the slight backward shift in ranking, partially offset by the university's rising ranking.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 2600), you can focus on Tier 1 majors like Law and Chinese Language and Literature; if your ranking is close to the upper limit (e.g., beyond 3400), you should center on Tier 2 majors like English and Humanities Experimental Class, with Tier 3 majors like Education and Public Administration as a stable backup.
